title: Aurora, 60321, Scottish Souvenir Teddy Bear, 8In, Soft Toy, Multi-Colour
features: From Aurora's highly popular Souvenir Collection
Soft and extremely touchable soft toy made with high quality materials
Adorable Teddy Bear dressed in Traditional Scottish Outfit
Children will love this soft and huggable Teddy Bear
description: Aurora’s Scottish Bear is a highly detailed Scottish souvenir teddy bear. He has a loveable face and wearing an exquisitely hand crafted Scottish outfit. This gorgeous bear makes the perfect gift for anyone who loves teddy bears and plush soft toys. Aurora World is an industry leader with over 40 years of experience in designing and manufacturing innovative and high quality plush products.
